Questions
Is Commit free to use?
Yes — Commit is free to download and use. Streak Savers are available to purchase when you need them. You earn one free Streak Saver every 60 days automatically.
What happens if I miss a day?
Your personal streak resets to zero. If you're in a Friend Streak, your friend's streak resets too. Real accountability with real consequences.
What is a Streak Saver?
A Streak Saver protects your streak when life gets in the way. Hold up to 3 at a time. They never expire. Use them wisely.
When does Commit launch?
Very soon on iOS and Android. Join the waitlist to be first and get early access.
